insight: As you've just completed your first session, you've taken the initial step towards building a consistent learning habit, and with a 1-day streak, you're off to a great start - now focus on analyzing what you learned in this first session to identify areas where you can improve. Given that your average score and last score are both 20%, your next goal should be to target a specific concept or topic that you struggled with and aim to increase your understanding of it by 10% in the next session, setting a achievable benchmark for progress.
